Valid display is one of 8 choices: 'Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient, which requires a medically appropriate history and/or examination and low level of medical decision making. When using time for code selection, 20-29 minutes of total time is spent on the date of the encounter.' (en), 'OFFICE OR OTHER OUTPATIENT VISIT FOR THE EVALUATION AND MANAGEMENT OF AN ESTABLISHED PATIENT, WHICH REQUIRES A MEDICALLY APPROPRIATE HISTORY AND/OR EXAMINATION AND LOW LEVEL OF MEDICAL DECISION MAKING. WHEN USING TIME FOR CODE SELECTION, 20-29 MINUTES OF TOTAL TIME IS SPENT ON THE DATE OF THE ENCOUNTER.' (en), 'OFFICE/OUTPATIENT ESTABLISHED LOW MDM 20-29 MIN' (en), 'OFFICE O/P EST LOW 20-29 MIN' (en), 'Established patient office or other outpatient visit, 20-29 minutes' (en), 'Outpatient visit for evaluation and management of established patient, including medically appropriate examination and low level of medical decision making, total time 20-29 minutes' (en), 'Outpatient visit for evaluation and management of established patient, including medically appropriate history and low level of medical decision making, total time 20-29 minutes' (en) or 'Outpatient visit for evaluation and management of established patient, including medically appropriate history, examination and low level of medical decision making, total time 20-29 minutes' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')

Bundle/pas-v221-response-must-support-example: Bundle.entry[0].resource/*ClaimResponse/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111*/.item[0].extension[7].extension[1].value.ofType(CodeableConcept): Wrong Display Name 'Significant, separately identifiable E/M service' for http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt#25. Valid display is 'Significant, Separately Identifiable Evaluation and Management Service by the Same Physician or Other Qualified Health Care Professional on the Same Day of the Procedure or Other Service: It may be necessary to indicate that on the day a procedure or service identified by a CPT code was performed, the patient's condition required a significant, separately identifiable E/M service above and beyond the other service provided or beyond the usual preoperative and postoperative care associated with the procedure that was performed. A significant, separately identifiable E/M service is defined or substantiated by documentation that satisfies the relevant criteria for the respective E/M service to be reported (see Evaluation and Management Services Guidelines for instructions on determining level of E/M service). The E/M service may be prompted by the symptom or condition for which the procedure and/or service was provided. As such, different diagnoses are not required for reporting of the E/M services on the same date. This circumstance may be reported by adding modifier 25 to the appropriate level of E/M service. Note: This modifier is not used to report an E/M service that resulted in a decision to perform surgery. See modifier 57 For significant, separately identifiable non-E/M services, see modifier 59.' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')

Bundle/pas-v221-response-must-support-example: Bundle.entry[0].resource/*ClaimResponse/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111*/.item[0].extension[7].extension[0].value.ofType(CodeableConcept): Wrong Display Name 'Office or other outpatient visit' for http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt#99213. Valid display is one of 8 choices: 'Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient, which requires a medically appropriate history and/or examination and low level of medical decision making. When using time for code selection, 20-29 minutes of total time is spent on the date of the encounter.' (en), 'OFFICE OR OTHER OUTPATIENT VISIT FOR THE EVALUATION AND MANAGEMENT OF AN ESTABLISHED PATIENT, WHICH REQUIRES A MEDICALLY APPROPRIATE HISTORY AND/OR EXAMINATION AND LOW LEVEL OF MEDICAL DECISION MAKING. WHEN USING TIME FOR CODE SELECTION, 20-29 MINUTES OF TOTAL TIME IS SPENT ON THE DATE OF THE ENCOUNTER.' (en), 'OFFICE/OUTPATIENT ESTABLISHED LOW MDM 20-29 MIN' (en), 'OFFICE O/P EST LOW 20-29 MIN' (en), 'Established patient office or other outpatient visit, 20-29 minutes' (en), 'Outpatient visit for evaluation and management of established patient, including medically appropriate examination and low level of medical decision making, total time 20-29 minutes' (en), 'Outpatient visit for evaluation and management of established patient, including medically appropriate history and low level of medical decision making, total time 20-29 minutes' (en) or 'Outpatient visit for evaluation and management of established patient, including medically appropriate history, examination and low level of medical decision making, total time 20-29 minutes' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')

Bundle/pas-v221-response-must-support-example: Bundle.entry[0].resource/*ClaimResponse/11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111*/.item[0].extension[7].extension[1].value.ofType(CodeableConcept): Wrong Display Name 'Significant, separately identifiable E/M service' for http://www.ama-assn.org/go/cpt#25. Valid display is 'Significant, Separately Identifiable Evaluation and Management Service by the Same Physician or Other Qualified Health Care Professional on the Same Day of the Procedure or Other Service: It may be necessary to indicate that on the day a procedure or service identified by a CPT code was performed, the patient's condition required a significant, separately identifiable E/M service above and beyond the other service provided or beyond the usual preoperative and postoperative care associated with the procedure that was performed. A significant, separately identifiable E/M service is defined or substantiated by documentation that satisfies the relevant criteria for the respective E/M service to be reported (see Evaluation and Management Services Guidelines for instructions on determining level of E/M service). The E/M service may be prompted by the symptom or condition for which the procedure and/or service was provided. As such, different diagnoses are not required for reporting of the E/M services on the same date. This circumstance may be reported by adding modifier 25 to the appropriate level of E/M service. Note: This modifier is not used to report an E/M service that resulted in a decision to perform surgery. See modifier 57 For significant, separately identifiable non-E/M services, see modifier 59.' (en) (for the language(s) 'en')
